zh.Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France: 法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume Ct DeGenevre於1185年出生在瑞士吉艾福吉艾福時，他的父親William de Geneve I55歲，母親Beatrix de Faucigny47歲。他於1220年與Alix de La Tour du Pin結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1252年享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume Ct DeGenevre于1185年出生在瑞士吉艾福吉艾福时，他的父亲William de Geneve I55岁，母亲Beatrix de Faucigny47岁。他于1220年与Alix de La Tour du Pin结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1252年享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Ct
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Cyrus  , sometimes used in America as an independent given name.

variants.name: Cyrus
meanings: From the Greek form (Kyros) of the name of several kings of Persia, most notably Cyrus the Great ( d. 529 bc ). The origin of the name is not known, but in the early Christian period it was associated with Greek kyrios ‘lord’, and borne by various saints, including an Egyptian martyr and a bishop of Carthage. In recent times it has been borne most famously by Cyrus Vance , U.S. Secretary of State 1977–1980 .

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume Ct DeGenevre was born in 1185, in Geneva, Geneva, Switzerland, his father, William de Geneve I, was 55 and his mother, Beatrix de Faucigny, was 47. He married Alix de La Tour du Pin in 1220. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1252, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume Ct DeGenevre est né en 1185, à Genève, Genève, Suisse, son père, William de Geneve I, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de Faucigny, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Alix de La Tour du Pin en 1220. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1252, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume Ct DeGenevre 1185 in Genf, Genf, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Geneve I 55 und seine Mutter Beatrix de Faucigny 47. Er hat 1220 Alix de La Tour du Pin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1252 im Alter von 67 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume Ct DeGenevre è nato il nel 1185 nel Ginevra, Ginevra, Svizzera, il suo padre, William de Geneve I, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix de Faucigny, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Alix de La Tour du Pin nel 1220. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1252, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume Ct DeGenevreが1185年にスイスジェンeブジェンeブで生まれた時，父William de Geneve Iは55歳，母Beatrix de Faucignyは47歳であった。1220年にAlix de La Tour du Pinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1252年に67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume Ct DeGenevre(이)가 1185년 스위스 e브 e브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Geneve I(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix de Faucigny(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1220년 Alix de La Tour du Pin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1252년 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume Ct DeGenevre nasceu em 1185, em Genève, Genève, Suiça, seu pai, William de Geneve I, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de Faucigny, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix de La Tour du Pin em 1220. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1252, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume Ct DeGenevre родился в 1185 г. в местности дженeв, дженeв, Швейцария, его отцу по имени William de Geneve I было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Faucigny, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix de La Tour du Pin в 1220 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1252 г. в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume Ct DeGenevre nació en 1185, en Genève, Genève, Suiza, su papá, William de Geneve I, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Beatrix de Faucigny, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Alix de La Tour du Pin en 1220. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1252, a la edad de 67 años.
